name: Paris & Nicole: The Encore
overview: More than 20 years since OG reality icons Paris Hilton and Nicole Richie first took the world by storm, the life-long friends reunite in a new special. Follow the dynamic duo as they try to produce a once-in-a-lifetime operatic performance based on their self-coined phrase, "Sanasa."

trailers.title: Paris Hilton and Nicole Richie Go to Walmart - Extended Preview
Paris Hilton and Nicole Richie Don’t Hold Back in the Bestie Game
